title: KoroskiHub
description: A minecraft optimization modpacks that was designed for better experience on the KoroškiHub minecraft server.
body:
# KoroskiHub Modpack

**Description:**  
KoroskiHub Modpack is a lightweight and optimized modpack designed to improve the gameplay of the **KoroskiHub** server. The modpack is optional to connect to the server, but includes a number of improvements to ensure smoother gameplay and better performance. The only mod required to connect to the server is **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)**, which allows for easy in-game voice communication.  

## What is included in the modpack?
- **Performance improvements:**  
  FPS optimization and resource management mods that improve gameplay fluidity, even on less powerful computers.  
- **Gameplay comfort add-ons:**  
  Minor enhancements that enrich the gameplay experience without changing the core game mechanics.  
- **Compatibility:**  
  Fully compatible with vanilla servers, with no unfair advantages or interference.  

## Why download this modpack?
- Simplify the installation of the **Simple Voice Chat** mod and recommended optimizations.  
- Improves performance for a smoother gaming experience.  
- Created specifically for **KoroskiHub**, but also useful on other servers.
